query:
SELECT 
  cm.isbn13, cm.title, cm.author,
  COUNT(ii.uuid) as totalQuantity,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ii.status = 'AVAILABLE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as availableQuantity,
  AVG(CASE WHEN ii.status = 'AVAILABLE' AND ii.suggestedPrice IS NOT NULL THEN ii.suggestedPrice ELSE NULL END) as avgPrice
FROM catalog_masters cm
LEFT JOIN inventory_items ii ON cm.isbn13 = ii.isbn13
WHERE 1=1
GROUP BY cm.isbn13, cm.title, cm.author
LIMIT 5
